name: code-map changed-refresh adoption
description: Multi-turn establish -> mutate -> refresh. Each task reads a working set of multi-line functions; the harness drifts two of them by inserting a unique marker comment inside the body (the signature/anchor line is preserved, so changedOnly re-anchors and returns the fresh slice). The scored refresh turn must report the markers. The map-changed arm should refresh via one read({refs, changedOnly:true}); the native arm re-reads/re-greps. Adoption signal: mcpChangedReadCallCount on the refresh turn. requiredSubstrings are the POST-edit markers, so a stale (un-refreshed) answer fails.
